TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Yayo, title = Yayo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yayo} }

S.FORM: alang Yayo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 408 buwan, 1,150 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 906 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 244 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 73%, Amis 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Yayo hya' ga Iraraley. tay mkyahu' na Yayo hya' ga Imaorod. tay 'llaw na Yayo hya' ga Iranmeylek. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Yayo ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwsan biru seneng maki 1 pqwsan biru seneng. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Yayo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 408 buwan, 1,150 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 906 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 244 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 73%, Amis 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Yayo hya' ga Iraraley. tay mkyahu' na Yayo hya' ga Imaorod. tay 'llaw na Yayo hya' ga Iranmeylek. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Yayo ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwsan biru seneng maki 1 pqwsan biru seneng. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ jajo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu laŋ-s~ɕjo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, jami **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na jajo ħjaʔ ɣa iraralej. taj mkjaħuʔ na jajo ħjaʔ ɣa imaoro*. taj ʔllaw na jajo ħjaʔ ɣa iranmejlek. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ jajo ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ maki * pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
